template_metadata.purpose: Complete remediation plan for Registry Automation System - 16 critical fixes

critical_constraint.name: NO_IMPLIED_BEHAVIOR
rules: Every fix must have: executable command, evidence artifact path, pass/fail condition
Items that cannot be automated MUST be marked NOT_AUTOMATABLE
EVERY STEP must have explicit inputs/outputs/invariants defined
All mutations MUST create backups before execution
All failures MUST fail-closed with explicit evidence

task_analysis.original_request: Fix 16 critical issues in Registry Automation System identified in audit

parallel_groups.reason: Sequential dependency on docs and bug fixes

gates: E2E validator catches all corruption types
steps: Each step produces required evidence artifacts
Each step respects file scope boundaries
Each step produces verifiable git diffs

decision_log_entry.rationale: 32+ files, requires contracts, production governance, 80%+ test coverage, fail-closed validation

assumptions: COLUMN_DICTIONARY can be located or regenerated
Phase A analyzers exist and work
pytest, ruff, mypy can be installed
out_of_scope: Add new Phase B/C analyzers (Option B: downgrade claims instead)
definition_of_done: Evidence trail complete for all steps

file_manifest.purpose: Change tracking, conflict detection, review scoping

global_files.reason: Update status from Production-Ready to Development

files.reason: Add required columns, duplicate ID, promotion state checks
Add patch generation and apply mode
Add patch generation and apply mode
Integration test for resolution → patch → apply
Option B: Downgrade claims OR wire Phase B/C

checks: All paths are relative to repo root
No duplicate write permissions in same phase
All created files have parent directories created first
Write permissions don't overlap across parallel phases

phase_overview.purpose: Fix docs, staging bug, add test infrastructure
Strengthen validation, convert entity resolution to mutation
Timestamp fix, path cleanup, evidence schema, Phase B/C decision

parallel_execution_groups.reason: Data integrity depends on test infrastructure
Validation depends on data integrity fixes
Non-blocking improvements can run in parallel with PH-05

execution_strategy.reason: Complex dependencies, shared files, needs careful coordination

dag_validation.command: echo 'DAG: PH-00 → PH-01 → PH-02 → PH-03 → PH-04 → PH-05'

worktree_isolation.reason: Single developer, sequential execution, simpler git workflow preferred

enforcement.rule: Phase CANNOT complete unless minimum level passed for ALL steps

PH-00-BOOTSTRAP.purpose: Create .state/ infrastructure for fail-closed preflight checks

PH-01-FOUNDATION.purpose: Fix documentation, staging bug, add test infrastructure

content_requirements: Line 79 must contain 'if file_id and transformed:'

failure_modes.remediation: Check test fixtures and script imports

PH-02-DATA_INTEGRITY.purpose: Fix defaults system, SHA256 promotion, restore data integrity
invariants: Registry data not modified except via governed patches
postconditions: python -c 'from scripts.P_01999000042260305005_column_loader import ColumnLoader; cl = ColumnLoader(); cl.load_columns(); assert hasattr(cl, "get_all_columns")'

failure_modes.meaning: COLUMN_DICTIONARY cannot be located or generated
failure_modes.remediation: Extract schema from registry, create minimal dictionary
Escalate to manual resolution, block promotion

PH-03-VALIDATION_RESOLUTION.purpose: Strengthen E2E validation, convert entity resolution to mutation
invariants: All mutations fail-closed on unresolved collisions

failure_modes.remediation: Escalate to manual resolution with evidence

PH-04-COMPLETENESS.purpose: Timestamp fix, path cleanup, evidence schema, Phase B/C decision

postconditions: python -c 'import json; c = json.load(open(".coverage.json")); assert c["totals"]["percent_covered"] >= 80'

failure_modes.remediation: Add tests for uncovered code paths

STEP-001-UPDATE-README.purpose: Update README.md status from Production-Ready to Development

failure_modes.remediation: Verify README content, may already be updated

invariants: Line 79 is the ONLY line changed

failure_modes.remediation: Verify line number, may already be fixed

validation_gates.purpose: README updated, staging bug fixed, smoke tests pass
Defaults system works, SHA256 promotion works
E2E validator enhanced, entity resolution mutates registry

context.question: Use worktree isolation or feature branches?

decision_ledger.rationale: Single developer, sequential phases, simpler git workflow sufficient

context.question: Wire Phase B/C or downgrade claims?
constraints: Phase B/C analyzers may not exist

decision_ledger.rationale: Phase B/C not critical for data integrity fixes, can add in future phase, reduces risk
Balances enterprise requirements with timeline, 50+ tests estimated achievable

risk_register.description: COLUMN_DICTIONARY cannot be located or regenerated
mitigation: Generate minimal dictionary from registry + docs
risk_register.contingency: Manual creation of minimal dictionary with 185 columns

risk_register.description: Test writing takes longer than estimated
risk_register.contingency: Extend PH-05 by 2 days, reduce scope of non-critical tests
Manual resolution with audit trail, block promotion

deliverables.name: Enhanced validation and entity resolution scripts

prerequisites: Git repository status clean (or create backup branch)
phase_execution_pattern: Execute all steps in phase sequentially
If gate passes, commit changes and move to next phase
If gate fails, review evidence, attempt self-healing, or escalate

final_actions.command: git add . && git commit -m 'feat: Complete Registry Automation Remediation - 16 fixes, 50+ tests, 80% coverage'
git checkout main && git merge --squash feature/registry-automation-remediation

audit_trail.git_commit_policy: One commit per phase with detailed message
